problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
